title: neocussonia litoralis
intro: Neocussonia litoralis, also known as sea holly or Eryngium maritimum, is a flowering plant species in the family Apiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Neocussonia litoralis include its ability to reduce swelling and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
